title: Spears to Halberds
body:
This is a simple resource pack that visually replaces the new **spears** in the game with **halberds**.
The pack does not change any gameplay mechanics or balance — it only affects the appearance of the weapon.

The halberd models and textures are designed to match Minecraft’s vanilla style, ensuring they feel natural in survival gameplay, combat, and the inventory UI. This resource pack is ideal for players who want a more medieval look or visual variety without installing mods.

**Features**
- Replaces spear models and textures with halberds
- Vanilla-friendly art style
- No OptiFine or mods required
- Compatible with most other resource packs (unless they also modify spears)
- Supported languages: English, Russian, German

# All halberds items
![All halberds items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/995ecf4156843f6f5105470c95200723dae0b6a7.jpeg)

# Netherite halberd in hand
![Netherite halberd in hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20a325327ba3b71872632333c5a472fa3027d9bd.jpeg)

# Zombie with iron halberd
![Zombie with iron halberd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bd08a3a49e4d63b0000f1f275354c0ae4111bde.jpeg)

If you find any bugs, want to suggest any changes, or want to translate the resource pack into your language, you can contact me on my Discord.
